tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file. Returns the full file content as text.

path.description: File path relative to repo root

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed. Use for generating documentation files.

path.description: File path relative to repo root

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and subdirectories at a path. Returns names with type indicators (file/dir).

path.description: Directory path relative to repo root (default: '.')

recursive.description: List recursively up to depth 3 (default: false)

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern in files. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.

path.description: Directory to search in (default: repo root)

tools.name: get_file_tree
tools.description: Get the full file tree of the repository as indented text. Respects .gitignore.

tools.name: get_db_state
tools.description: Query the Spark SQLite database for file states, documented files, or stale files.

tools.name: update_rules_index
tools.description: Add or update an entry in a RULES_INDEX.md file.

index_path.description: Path to RULES_INDEX.md relative to repo root

entry_path.description: Relative path to the rule file from the index

summary.description: One-line summary for the index entry

section.description: Section heading to place the entry under (e.g. 'Documentation Rules')

tools.name: ask_user
tools.description: Ask the user a question in the terminal. Returns their answer. Supports default values (user presses Enter to accept).

question.description: The question to display to the user

default.description: Default value shown in brackets, returned if user presses Enter

hint.description: Optional hint displayed before the question

tools.name: read_spark_plans
tools.description: Read all project plan .md files and spark_init.json from .claude/spark_plans/. Returns plan contents and init settings.

tools.name: install_templates
tools.description: Install Agent Blueprint templates into the target directory. Adapts to platform (claude/windsurf/copilot/codex). Can overwrite existing files if requested.

target_dir.description: Target directory to install into (default: current dir)

overwrite_rules.description: Overwrite existing rules and skills files (default: false)

tools.name: scan_existing
tools.description: Scan target repo for existing platform directories, instructions files, rules, and skills. Use before install_templates to decide what to overwrite.

target_dir.description: Target directory to scan (default: current dir)

tools.name: list_library
tools.description: List all plugins in the Spark library catalog. Optionally filter by category. Returns summaries (id, name, description, category, tags).

category.description: Filter by category (e.g. 'memory', 'testing'). Empty for all.

tools.name: search_library
tools.description: Search the Spark library catalog by keyword. Matches against name, description, tags, and category.

tools.name: get_plugin_details
tools.description: Get full details for a specific plugin including pros, cons, config options, and integration info.

tools.name: install_plugin
tools.description: Install a plugin from the Spark library. Clones the repo, copies rules/skills into the project, and updates RULES_INDEX.md.

config_overrides.description: JSON string of config option overrides (default: '{}')

tools.name: code_search
tools.description: Search code symbols, get source code, file outlines, dependency graphs, blast radius analysis, symbol complexity, and repo overviews. Requires code indexing to be enabled.

action.description: search: find symbols by query. get_source: get source for a symbol ID. file_outline: list symbols in a file. dependency_graph: file-level import graph. blast_radius: files affected by changing a symbol. symbol_complexity: cyclomatic complexity metrics. repo_overview: high-level repo outline.

symbol_id.description: Symbol ID like 'src/auth.py::login#function' (for get_source, blast_radius, symbol_complexity)

file_path.description: File path relative to repo root (for file_outline, dependency_graph)

kind.description: Filter by symbol kind: function, class, method, variable, etc. (for search action)

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern to filter files, e.g. 'src/auth/**' (for search action)

direction.description: Direction for dependency_graph: imports (what this file depends on), importers (what depends on this file), both (default: imports)

depth.description: Traversal depth for dependency_graph and blast_radius (1-3, default: 1)

tools.name: code_index
tools.description: Create or update the code symbol index for the repository. Also checks index status.

action.description: index: create/update the code index. status: check if index exists.
